CONTENT.Career: Diarra made his senior debut for Évian during the 2015–16 Ligue 2 season, and then joined Rennes in July 2016. He spent the 2018–19 season on loan at Le Mans, helped them gain promotion to Ligue 2 via the play-offs, and joined them on a three-year contract in June 2019.In summer 2020, Diarra moved to FC Lorient, newly promoted to Ligue 1, on a five-year contract. The transfer fee paid to Le Mans was reported as €3 million.On 21 August 2023, Diarra joined Saint-Étienne on a season-long loan.
CONTENT.Personal life: Born in Abidjan, Ivory Coast, he holds both Ivorian and French nationalities.

SUMMARY: Stéphane Diarra (born 9 December 1998) is an Ivorian professional footballer who plays as a winger for  Ligue 1 club Saint-Étienne, on loan from  Ligue 2 club Lorient.
